channel.title: Arcade Displays on One Stop Pinball Shop
channel.description: Recent content in Arcade Displays on One Stop Pinball Shop

item.title: Dot Matrix Display 64x128 - Handmade Wood Edition
item.description: This is the warm-finish version of the 64x128 display, built for game rooms where a softer, furniture-like housing fits better than a machined metal look. The screen behavior stays powerful, but the enclosure blends more naturally into home setups.

item.title: Dot Matrix Display 64x128 - Industrial CNC Edition
item.description: This is the industrial version of the 64x128 display, built for setups where the enclosure should look as intentional as the electronics. The CNC housing gives straight edges, tighter panel lines and a cleaner technical look than the wood edition.
